We encrypt transmission of data on pages where you provide payment information. decoder_heading: Our Privacy Policy May Change From Time To Time
ident_heading: Our privacy policy may change from time to time
heading_content_part: Our privacy policy may change from time to time. If we make any material changes to our policies, we will place a prominent notice on our website or application. If the change materially affects registered users, we will send a notice to you by email, push notification or text.
